title: 3rd AC - goodbye my entire microbiome
body: 10 days out from my 3rd dose dense AC I was feeling like I was dominating the chemo (im pregnant and whilst this is a shitshow my doc advised that pregnancy protects against nausea)...today i woke up with insane mouth ulcers, then a yeast infection and now sore stomach. I can only assume every helpful bacteria I've spent a lifetime acquiring has been nuked. How will I ever get well again and will the 12 weeks of taxol continue this obliteration.
